children.html: f(6)=36−30+6=12f(−6)=36+30+6=72f(3)=9−15+6=0f(−3)=9+15+6=−15f(2)=4−10+6=0f(−2)=4+10+6=20f(1)=1−5+6=2f(−1)=1+5+6=12\begin{align} f(6) &= 36 - 30 + 6 = 12\\ f(-6) &= 36 + 30 + 6 = 72\\ f(3) &= 9 - 15 + 6 = 0\\ f(-3) &= 9 + 15 + 6 = -15\\ f(2) &= 4 - 10 + 6 = 0\\ f(-2) &= 4 + 10 + 6 = 20\\ f(1) &= 1 - 5 + 6 = 2\\ f(-1) &= 1 + 5 + 6 = 12\\ \end{align}f(6)f(−6)f(3)f(−3)f(2)f(−2)f(1)f(−1)​=36−30+6=12=36+30+6=72=9−15+6=0=9+15+6=−15=4−10+6=0=4+10+6=20=1−5+6=2=1+5+6=12​​
